items.headline: Mixed-use housing development approved for East Middlefield Road
items.summary: Mountain View City Council voted on a second reading for a mixed-use residential development at 490 East Middlefield Road, moving it toward final approval. This project will add housing and likely ground-floor commercial space to an area currently underutilized.

items.headline: Mountain View applies for state housing incentive funding
items.summary: The city submitted an application for California's Prohousing Incentive Program Round 4, which provides grants to cities that remove housing barriers and streamline development. If awarded, this funding could accelerate housing projects and reduce approval timelines.

items.headline: City holding community meeting on safe parking program
items.summary: Sunnyvale is hosting a public meeting on Monday, March 23 at 5:30 p.m. to discuss its safe parking initiative. This program addresses vehicle dwelling and parking for unhoused residents in the city.

items.headline: Santa Clara planning major changes around train station
items.summary: The city's Station Area Task Force is reviewing a new land use plan and design guidelines for the area around Santa Clara Station. This could reshape what gets built near transit and affect traffic, housing, and local character in that part of town.
